title: The HOMO Interaction
description: Use the clues to decide which ingredient reveals the most information when consulted in the Royal Society book.

hints.text: The Royal Society book reveals whether an ingredient's alchemical is Solar or Lunar. Consulting a confirmed ingredient gives no new information. The most useful choice is the ingredient whose Solar/Lunar nature is most uncertain — the one most evenly split between the two possibilities.

Still uncertain (Solar / Lunar candidates both possible):
  ing6: 21 Solar / 21 Lunar alchemicals still consistent ← most balanced
  ing1: 19 Solar / 23 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing2: 19 Solar / 23 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing4: 23 Solar / 19 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing5: 16 Solar / 26 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing7: 26 Solar / 16 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing3: 9 Solar / 33 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing8: 35 Solar / 7 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
Most informative ingredient to consult: ing6.
